text:
<think>I need to determine how many pounds of ground beef Aiden will use to make 80 meatballs, given that 1 pound yields 16 meatballs.</think>
Since Aiden gets 16 meatballs from each pound of ground beef, he will need 80 ÷ 16 = 5 pounds of ground beef to make 80 meatballs.
<think>Now, I need to calculate how much seasoning he uses per pound and multiply by the total pounds needed.</think>
He adds 2 tablespoons of seasoning for every pound of ground beef.
<think>Multiplying the number of pounds by the tablespoons per pound will give the total amount of seasoning needed.</think>
So, for 5 pounds of ground beef, he will need 5 × 2 = 10 tablespoons of seasoning.
<think>I should now present the final answer after the required #### marker.</think>
#### 10
